Notice And Motion To Compel Further Responses To Pltf'S Demand To Inspect Subject Bus
Off Calendar Oct-04-2007 Denied
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCE:
Matthew D. Davis, Esq. appearing for plaintiff/moving party Imelda Torrente
Karen E. Kirby, Esq. appearing for defendant/opposing party City & County of San Francisco

RULING:
Plaintiff Imelda Torrente and Rodolfo Torrente's Motion to compel further responses to demand for inspection -- Argued and tentative ruling adopted. Plaintiff's motion is denied on condition that defendant stipulate that it will not move or otherwise position the bus at or near the scene of the incident for the purpose of conducting the type of visibility study proposed by plaintiff. COMMISSIONER: BRUCE E. CHAN.
